description: Phase 17 scan_claim_schema: every scanners/*.claim.json must have 8 required fields — id, type, description, actual_cmd, expected, must_fail, recheck_cadence, owner. Optional fields (proposal_ref, tolerance) are allowed. Catches malformed new claims that would silently produce meaningless proof results.
actual_cmd: bash -c '[ -f reports/n6_claim_schema.json ] && jq -r "if .deficient_count == 0 then 1 else 0 end" reports/n6_claim_schema.json 2>/dev/null || echo 0'
